cases.name: materialize_partition_columns_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[materializePartitionColumns] table succeeds; the feature instructs writers to store partition column values in data files in addition to the partition metadata.

cases.name: materialize_partition_columns_read_snapshot_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[materializePartitionColumns] table succeeds; materializePartitionColumns is writer-only and readers need not understand writer-only features.
